hooks.command: echo '⚙ Orchestrator started — use baton plan + baton execute to drive tasks through the execution engine.'

bash -c 'TIMESTAMP=$(date -Iseconds); AGENT="$CLAUDE_AGENT_NAME"; echo "### $TIMESTAMP — $AGENT — COMPLETE" >> .claude/team-context/mission-log.md 2>/dev/null; echo "✓ Mission log updated for agent completion"'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "(/(\\.|^)\.env($|/)|/secrets/|/node_modules/|\\.(pem|key)$|/\.credentials)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Write to protected path: $FILE" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
bash -c 'if [ -f .claude/team-context/mission-log.md ]; then echo "📋 Mission log: .claude/team-context/mission-log.md"; fi'
